message:
feat(agent): Add --resume flag for idempotent session resumption

Implements idempotent resumption for interrupted agent apply operations:

- Add --resume flag to AgentApplyArgs to enable resumption
- Load completed action IDs from outcomes.jsonl (status=success only)
- Filter out already-completed actions before apply loop
- Add defense-in-depth skip checks in all execution paths
- Track resumed_skipped separately from regular skipped
- Show resume count in summary output for visibility
- Include resumed: true in JSON output when flag is used
- When --resume is used with no --pids/--targets, auto-enable
  --recommended behavior for convenience

Closes process_triage-t6lf (session continuity and resumption)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
